$schema-note: Counts-only baseline for scripts/check-knip-baseline.ts. Each key maps to the per-file array name in knip --reporter json. CI fails if any current count exceeds the matching baseline. Update procedure: docs/runbooks/ci.md §6.
capturedFromCommit: kh-prod-readiness-S31 W4 — OPS-50 Wave B Knip baseline cleanup. Sub-bucket 1 (BACKWARD-COMPAT-REEXPORT delete): trimmed 5 re-export blocks (lib/ingest/markdown-orchestrator.ts, lib/mcp/formatters/index.ts barrel, components/create-content/index.ts, lib/content-browsing/index.ts, contexts/taxonomy-context.tsx). Sub-bucket 2 (PUBLIC-API @public marking): added knip.config.ts `tags: ['-public']` rule and marked ~225 entries with @public JSDoc covering hook returns (UseXReturn/Options/Params/Result), live component prop interfaces (verified mounted in app/), AI client params, MCP tool authoring contracts, pipeline run-record params (CLAUDE.md chokepoints), warnings envelope, intelligence/extraction/coverage public-API types, validation handover-time configurability constants. Sub-bucket 3 (GENUINELY-DEAD delete): removed dead types/schemas in types/content.ts, lib/validation/{template-schemas, ai-schemas, jsonb}.ts, lib/governance/presets.ts, lib/intelligence/types.ts; demoted internal-only constants in lib/search-history.ts and hooks/intelligence/use-feed-articles.ts. Skipped lib/queue/enqueue.ts and 2 bid-template routes per main-track S223 ownership. 8 types remaining: 6 barrel-style `export type { X }` re-exports left alone per memory feedback_three_doc_growth_dynamic; 2 in lib/queue/enqueue.ts (S223 territory).
